rationale: Severe mismatch across every axis: the anime power-up aesthetic (saturated blue/magenta, flashing rainbow, male hero charging energy) directly contradicts Marble Sort!'s soft pastel lavender palette, no-character calm/satisfying mood, and 25-55 female casual puzzle audience. The hook also has zero conceptual link to physics-based color sorting or conveyor management, so even a reskin wouldn't preserve the archetype's appeal. Skip this archetype — the cluster is also a single-creative, single-advertiser data point with weak signal, not worth testing.
